news.headline: After Trump pauses war, Iranians fly flags of victory, not surrender
news.summary: Amid fierce disagreements, the dramatic, last-minute decision to halt attacks seems less like an exit ramp than a rest stop for all sides.

news.headline: Ukraine’s veterans’ theatre turns war wounds into catharsis
news.summary: Wounded soldiers, wives and widows workshop ideas and stage plays in Kyiv, bringing the audience to tears.

news.headline: On Truth Social, die-hard MAGA supporters start to turn on Trump
news.summary: PRESS REVIEW – Thursday, April 10: We bring you world reactions after the US and Iran signed a fragile two-week ceasefire. news.headline: Record animal sacrifice attempts at Al-Aqsa prompt status quo fears
news.summary: Record attempts by Israeli settlers to smuggle sacrifices into Al-Aqsa Mosque mark unprecedented escalation since 1967.

news.headline: Fury wants boxing clash with Joshua after comeback fight against Makhmudov
news.summary: Fury, who returns to the ring against Makhmudov on Saturday, says he wants to face his compatriot Joshua next.
